In the Women's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix take on Trent Rockets at Edgbaston. A fourth-placed finish for Trent Rockets last year saw them fall just short of the knockouts.
Year: 2026; Category: Sports Show, Cricket;

In the Men's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix take on last year's runners-up Trent Rockets at Edgbaston. The Rockets look to go one step further this year after defeat in the 2025 final.
